column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for our area. Stay tuned for further updates on your ABC Action News Station.

but the RAIN here is insane the last couple of hours!

I learned a few years ago Thst a warning can also mean radar has determined it’s very favorable but it doesn’t mean it’s touched down. Years ago it was different. A warning used to mean it was actually spotted . ( back in the cave days I guess) Anyway , I’m in Desoto and watching live coverage on TV earlier and they were tracking the “ warning” area snd not one of them touched down luckily. Edit : I just remembered : “ Warning “ means it’s been detected on Radar.Thats probably safer than waiting till one hits the ground

Newbie- do you all wake your young kids and bring them down to the first floor? Only “interior room” down there is a tiny bathroom.
Are you from up north? Follow the same protocol.
up north we have something called a basement
First floor, interior room. The water tables are too high for basements, fyi.
I do know this about the water tables.
Not all the time. I didn’t have a basement in my last two places in the Midwest. Head for a windowless room, or under a stairwell.
do you have space or a closet that is under a staircase?
Yes. I've been in southeast Florida for 13 years and I've always woken up my kids to go to an interior room or bathroom downstairs.
That’s what you do.
You’ll want them close if there’s a tornado warning.
Denis Phillips. Has the track moved east towards citrus or is that false?
I wanna know too

A watch or warning? In Oklahoma a warning means a tornado has been seen or looks like one may be forming. Watching you from 22 hours away since I have a kid in Orlando. Thanks for the updates!
it’s the same everywhere…

well he keeps saying warning and it confuses me because my daughter is living in Orlando and I can’t figure out- is a tornado being seen? We are very savvy about tornados in Oklahoma but I am 22 hours away from my daughter in Orlando. So just trying to make sure I know where it is.
Im from Oklahoma. It means the ingredients are there and rotation is seen! Get ready

rotation and possible funnel cloud makes it a warning. I lived in Orlando for 5 years before moving to the west coast in 2020. She should take cover if they have a warning, but I am guessing they are not like the ones you may have experienced. I hope your daughter is safe.

it is just hard trying to guage what is happening in Orlando living in Oklahoma. And she doesn’t have cable so she isn’t watching tv. I am used to our meteorologists in Oklahoma on tv and knowing exactly where it is headed and when.

well you’re on the right post. Denis Phillips is the most reliable meteorologist to follow as he doesn’t fear monger. I have never had cable. Your daughter can watch many media sources on her phone, including the many meteorologists on here. I understand the worry, but I am sure she is okay!
warning can be radar indicated if the radar is pickingvup on winds that are rotating to and from the radar .But also there us a warning when someone see them but usually they will say confirmed

yes as an Oklahoman we are very familiar with tornado watches and warnings. I am 22 hours away from my kid who isn’t paying any attention so just trying to guage what is happening there so if I need to alert her I can. We are very fortunate here that our meteorologists tell us within a mile usually where it is and we watch it on tv as it approaches. Don’t usually take shelter unless it is about 3 or so miles away. It is so hard to know what is going on from this far. My daughter is just watching Netflix on her phone living her best life not worrying - so you know, I do the worrying and checking for her! 🤣

it does not. It means that one is either radar indicated or spotted. 🙄
And before ya ask-I’ve lived in OK, TX, KS, MN, and WI-
